name: py2rust-ccb-to-ccbr-rename
title: Wave 3 品牌：ccb→ccbr 全面重命名（二进制/配置目录/配置文件/tmux身份/env/crate名）
description: Full ccb->ccbr rebrand across the Rust workspace: binary ccbr, config dir .ccbr, config file ccbr.config, tmux @ccb_->@ccbr_, env CCB_->CCBR_, crate names ccb-*->ccbr-*. Avoid collision with locally-installed Python ccb.
creator: luck
